The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Living Cramped Corridor

Dust motes dance in pale light from overhead fixtures.
Posters twist into warnings.
Air tastes of late regrets.
Beacon turned tomb for grand ambitions.
Scientist vanished pre-breach.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.
